document.title: Envelope Wrapper
document.summary: Wraps application data in a messaging-system-specific envelope for transport.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope<T> is the universal wrapper — typed payload, headers, correlation ID, business key, timestamps.

document.title: Content Enricher
document.summary: Augments a message with additional data from an external source.
document.implementation: Processing.Transform.ContentEnricher adds enrichment data via configurable enrichment functions.

document.title: Content Filter
document.summary: Removes unwanted data from a message before forwarding.
document.implementation: Processing.Transform.ContentFilter strips fields or sections based on filter rules.

document.title: Claim Check
document.summary: Store message data in persistent storage and pass a claim check (reference) instead of the full data.
document.implementation: Storage.Cassandra stores large payloads; the message carries a claim-check ID for retrieval.

document.title: Normalizer
document.summary: Routes each message type through the appropriate translator to produce a common canonical format.
document.implementation: Processing.Transform.MessageNormalizer applies type-specific transforms to produce a canonical IntegrationEnvelope.

document.title: Canonical Data Model
document.summary: Define a common data model shared across all applications to reduce coupling.
document.implementation: IntegrationEnvelope<T> is the canonical model — all messages flow through the platform as typed envelopes.
